quality.rationale: 结合Ricci恒等式与Killing方程完成多步张量缩并推导，并类比电磁场构造作用量原理，物理逻辑链条完整且具有理论延展性

origin.question: 10.6. Show that any Killing vector is a solution of the equation$$\xi_{; \lambda}^{\nu ; \lambda} + \mathrm {R}_{\sigma}^{\nu} \xi^{\sigma} = 0.$$Find a Lagrangian-type variational principle from which this equation can be derived.
